title: prunella grandiflora var. hastifolia
intro: Prunella grandiflora var. hastifolia, also known as self-heal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. Its medicinal properties include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, offering several health benefits including improved immune function and reduced inflammation. Self-heal can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular herbal remedy in natural medicine.
